allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const { PrismaClient } = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\({datasourceUrl: process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); p.$connect\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\(''Connected!''\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const { PrismaClient } = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\({datasourceUrl: process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); p[''$connect'']\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\(''Connected!''\); return p[''$disconnect'']\(\); }\);")
